1.content:
Today is the big day. Neckbeards Inc. vs. The Edge_Runners. its the final matchup of the season and winner takes all is a gross understatement all things considered.

You are a member of Neckbeards inc. but who?...


Anthony Vercetti. Male sex, cisgender, Gamer tag "TV", but just Tony to his friends, 23 years old, he's six feet tall, cut build, Caucasian, blue eyes, Blonde hair. Team captain.

Nicholas Moriarty. Male sex, cisgender, Gamer tag "Mid_187", Nick to his friends, 22 years old, 5'8, Medium build with a beer gut, Caucasian, dark brown eyes, dark brown hair.

Samantha Jordan. Male sex, Transgender-Woman, Gamer tag "SeriousSammy", Sam to her friends. 34 years old, 5'10 Medium build, African American, Dark Brown hair(currently dyed blue), Brown eyes.

Gwendolyn Belmonte. Female sex, cisgender, Gamer tag "GwenCyanide", Gwen to her friends, 21 years old, 5'2, petite/pixie build, Caucasian, pink hair, brown eyes.

Sumiko Kaneko. Female sex, nonbinary gender(They/Them pronouns), Gamer tag "KitsuneMoon", Sumi to her friends, 22 years old, 5'6, Chubby build, Japanese American, Long straight black hair, Brown eyes.
1.title: Character Picking.

choices: YOU WIN! You won the bet!!
YOU LOSE! You lost the bet!!
11.content:
You are Tony:
You are Tall, Strong, Confident, and Attractive. You speak loud n clear, and just ooze with confidence in everything you do. add to that the fact that you're a pretty chill dude, and a more than competent gamer, and i guess its no real mystery as to why you are team captain of Neckbeards Inc.

You been preparing for this day all year and its finally here. its time to put those Team Edge_Runner plebs in their place. teach them a little humility, and what better way is there to do that than to beat their ass on Live Stream for the whole world to see?... Well, you can think of a better way, but that's a more private matter that you hope to enjoy in the comfort of your own home.

The competition was simple, there's 5 members on each team, so each of you will be pared up against a member of the other team and play a series of 3 matches. the player to win 2 of the 3 will be declared the winner and the whole team will get a point.
The team with 3 out of 5 points will be the winning team and this years champions. With that of course comes cash, fame, and prizes from the competitions sponsors.
But what the media and the rest of the world isn't aware of is the little side bet you all have going.

The idea actually came to you when you were talking a little trash with the Team Captain of the Edge_Runners, Zoey Shepard.
You and Zoey have known each other for about 10 years, but only as enemies/rivals.
Its admittedly a little serendipitous that she would end up being your rival in the finals this year. Like seeing The Steelers play The Ravens at the Superball.
Anyway though, back to the bet.

Well, it turns out her daddy gave her a Shrinker when she started competing in the big leagues and would be traveling to compete in big cities with sold-out venues.

When she told you that it got the gears in your head turning and made you propose what many would call the worlds dumbest bet.


The night went on about as good as you could have hoped for. Nick an Sam lost their matchups, but Gwen and Sumiko held it down and won theirs, so now its all down to You vs. Zoey to decide the whole thing... No Pressure..

The game is the newest Mortal Kombat. Right out of the gate she picks Scorpion. That character is still stupidly OP, but you're confident in your selection.

The first round goes by fast... Way too fast. She completely dominated you it was fucking embarrassing. Round two, you hold on a little longer, but still end up losing. that 1 point for her

The next match starts. this time she plays with a different charter, she must be getting cocky. a rooky mistake you waste no time in making her pay for and bada-bing you wipe the floors with her both rounds. now that's a point for you.

The announcers inform you two that the third and final match will be a sudden death match consisting of only one round.
She goes back to Scorpion, he must be her favorite character, or at least the one she's best with. the match starts and...
11.title: Tony

111.content:
You cant believe it, you actually won. You managed to pull it off and now theres balloons, and confetti, and you have Some semi famous youtuber in your face congratulating you and asking questions.

It all just feels so surreal and flying by like a blur. One minute your teammates are all hugging you and telling you how great you are, then you’re suddenly at the after party celebrating with them and your family and their families.

Before you know it you’re waking up to your phone going off with a text message from Zoey that says “Lets get this over with. We’re all meeting up at my place in 20 mins.”


You don’t waste anytime throwing in some clothes. You pull on a pair of shorts, a tee-shirt, and flip-flops then head downtown.

You all agreed to meet at Zoeys because its a trailer outside of town. It would be a safe place with no cameras or strangers.

You get to Zoeys and you’re the last one to arrive. Everyone else is already there waiting on you.
Theres of course all your teammates, but also Zoey and her team and they are they are

Zoey Shepard, the 6ft tall green eyed red head ed 23 year old with freckles and a dynamite ass. Shes pretty intense and kind of intimidating. One of those types that know what they want and aren’t afraid to take it.

Her 20 year old baby brother Randy Shepard. He’s just as tall as her and but a lot meaner. Also a ginger and kind of a bully and a douchebag to be completely honest. It will be nice to see him cut down to size.

Tenchi Miyamoto. As the name suggests he’s Japanese. He’s a good looking guy. You can tell he spends a lot of time on his raven colored hair as its always jelled up and spiked. You’re not sure if he doesn’t know english, or is just refusing to speak it because he’s not much of a talker.

Jason Samuel. Another tall guy. African American from Philadelphia. Seems nice, but quiet.

And Michelle Cortinas. A Tall, voluptuous, tan skinned Latino woman from Miami Florida. Famously hot headed and always ready to fight in game and in real life.


Zoey hands you what looks like a small chrome laser pointer and says “You were the big winner, so you get first pick. Witch one if us is going to become your pet?
111.title: YOU WIN! You won the bet!!

112.content:
You cant believe it, you lost. You honestly though you could pull it off but now theres balloons, and confetti, and you see some semi famous youtuber congratulating your opponent and asking them questions.

It all just feels so surreal and flying by like a blur. One minute your teammates were all cheering you on and telling you you got this, then you’re suddenly being ushered off the stage to the disappointed faces of your friends and family.

Before you know it you’re waking up to your phone going off with a text message from Zoey that says “You better not be trying to weasel out of this. We’re all meeting up at my place in 20 mins...”


You don’t waste anytime throwing on some clothes. You pull on a pair of shorts, a tee-shirt, and flip-flops then head out.

You all agreed to meet at Zoeys because its a trailer outside of town. It would be a safe place with no cameras or strangers.

You get to Zoeys and you’re the last one to arrive. Everyone else is already there waiting on you.
Theres of course all your teammates, but also Zoey and her team and they are they are

Zoey Shepard, the 6ft tall green eyed red headed 23 year old with freckles and a dynamite ass. Shes pretty intense and kind of intimidating. One of those types that know what they want and aren’t afraid to take it.

Her 20 year old baby brother Randy Shepard. He’s just as tall as her but a lot meaner. Also a ginger and kind of a bully and a douchebag to be completely honest. It would have been nice to see him cut down to size.

Tenchi Miyamoto. As the name suggests he’s Japanese. He’s a good looking guy. You can tell he spends a lot of time on his raven colored hair as its always jelled up and spiked. You’re not sure if he doesn’t know english, or is just refusing to speak it because he’s not much of a talker.

Jason Samuel. Another tall guy. African American from Philadelphia. Seems nice, but quiet.

And Michelle Cortinas. A Tall, voluptuous, tan skinned Latino woman from Miami Florida. Famously hot headed and always ready to fight in game and in real life.


Suddenly Zoey zapped you with what looked to be a small chrome laser pointer and you shrunk away to only about 3 inches tall.
You clothes don’t shrink with you trapping you in a pile of cotton that smells like, well... You..

Before you know whats happening a hand reaching in under your shirt as you’re being picked up by....
112.title: YOU LOSE! You lost the bet!!

choices: YOU WIN! Your team won the bet!!
YOU LOSE! Your team lost the bet!!
12.content:
You are Nick:
You're not as pretty or charismatic as Tony. you're a lot more reserved and often times accused of being aloof. You don't really like crowds much. not in the same way that Gwen doesn't though as her introvertedness stems from anxiety, you actually just don't like people in general.
Being a textbook misanthrope, you typically have difficulties understanding why people get triggered so easy or why everyone seems to have a stick up their ass about shit that you just don't think matters. Oddly enough though, you do like stand up comedians, and like to tell jokes, so you're not all that bad to be around as you do make your friends laugh sometimes.


The competition was simple, there's 5 members on each team, so each of you will be pared up against a member of the other team and play a series of 3 matches. the player to win 2 of the 3 will be declared the winner and the whole team will get a point.
The team with 3 out of 5 points will be the winning team and this years champions. With that of course comes cash, fames, and prizes from the competitions sponsors.
But what the media and the rest of the world isn't aware of is the little side bet you all have going.

UGH, that stupid bet. what a dumb fucking idea. you would ask what genius came up with it, but that genius happens to be your best friend and Team Captain, Tony...You love the man, but sometimes he too much of a tool for you to even stand.


You had a bad feeling about the night and your feeling has been pretty much spot on.
You had hoped that your teammates would win this thing without your help, but that was clearly asking too much. Gwen and Sam did alright, but Sumiko and Tony did you no favors. currently the score is 2-2, so now its up to you to win this thing.... Fuck..

Your opponent is Jason Samuels. He's from the inner city, and has that whole "Bad Side of Philly. Pulled myself up by my boot straps" thing going on. Blaw blaw blaw, real inspiring story for the urban youths. You do respect him, but his story isn't new, and that doesn't mean you're gonna go easy on him.

same as before three match's, best two out of three is the winner. the game?... OG StarCraft. You're actually pretty stoked about this.

Round one, You play Zarg and he plays Terrans. You wasted no time amassing an group of Zlings and rushing him ASAP. you got lucky, and caught him with his pants down. Victory.

Round two, He's playing Protoss this time around. things aren't going so good this time and long story short you and him are now 1-1

Round three, he seemed to like how that went last time and is playing Protoss again and you go Zarg for a third time. last time you didn't keep the pressure on him and he ended up spamming you with Carriers, but this time around you don't intend to let that shit happen...
12.title: Nick

13.content:
You are Sam:
You’re the groups rock. Seriously, You’re not sure if its the fact that you’re a little older than the other members of the group, or maybe its because you’ve done and seen a lot more having been born in London not only making you the only “city slicker” in the group, but also the most traveled as you’re the furthest from home. This has caused you to be thrusted into a weird position where everyone always seems to look to you when they’re unsure of what to do.
If Tony were the teams dad, then you’re definitely the mom, and unofficially next in line if a new captain is ever need.

Most people describe you as “tough, but fair”, and your unofficial nick-name is Momma Bear, but you’er rather comfortable with that.


The competition was simple, there's 5 members on each team, so each of you will be pared up against a member of the other team and play a series of 3 matches. the player to win 2 of the 3 will be declared the winner and the whole team will get a point.
The team with 3 out of 5 points will be the winning team and this years champions. With that of course comes cash, fames, and prizes from the competitions sponsors.
But what the media and the rest of the world isn't aware of is the little side bet you all have going.

This stupid bet. Where the hell did Tony get off making a promise like that with all our lives?

Then he turns around and chokes on game day. Nick and Sumiko were able to win their matchups, but Gwen and Tony definitely didn’t bring their A-games today.

Then theres your opponent, Tenchi Miyamoto. He is probably the best player on the Edge_Runners roster, and now its come down to you and him to decide who will take home gold, and the other team and he cant even speak english.

The game is TitanFall 2. Its a good choice. You feel like you got lucking with this one as you enjoy playing it anyway.

The first two rounds go about as expected. You are able to squash him in the first round, but he he was clearly just trying to feel you out because he comes back in force in the second round and theres not much you could do to stop him.

Now the score is 1-1 and this last match will be the big decider. Will you win or lose?

131.title: YOU WIN! Your team won the bet!

choices: Drop Randy down the front of your panties...
Push Randy down the back of your panties..
1312.content:
Randy Shepard. Seriously, fuck that guy.
Everyone in the group has some horror story about something awful Randy has done to them. He’s just such a bully and an asshole, so its only fitting that he go first.

You point the laser pointer at him and he looks you dead in the eyes. “Wait... Me?!” he says in a bit of shock. “What did i ever do to you?!”

“You know how us Apache Helicopters are.” you say reminding him of his favorite nickname for you, and hinting at all the other horrible things he’s said about trans people over the years.

Then just before he can say anything you push the button. A blue dot appears on his chest and suddenly his empty clothes all just falls to the floor.

You hand the laser pointer off the the left to Sumiko and walk over to the pile Of clothing.
You lift up his shirt and see him crawling around on his hands and knees in his boxer shorts at only 3 inches tall, and you can’t help but to get a huge grin on your face.

You can hear him shouting up at you, but its too faint to hear it from down there.

“What was that?” You ask.

He stands up and lifts his hands up to his mouth trying to make a blow horn out of them and screams it again, but its no use, he’s just too little to hear, but thats not really a bad thing considering he’s never really had anything nice to say about anyone anyway.

Your eyes glance down at his exposed flaccid penis and raise an eyebrow. He can read the expression on your face and feel your gaze causing him to quickly bring his hands back down to hide it from you.

You’re just about to make a comment on it When you hear Sumiko behind you “ummm, can i go next?”

Then Tony responds “i don’t see why not.” Giving you the cue to clear the range.

Randy lets out one more scream as you reach for him, but the sound is muffled out by your hand as he disappears into it when you grab him incasing him in darkness.

You stand back up and walk back over to your group of friends. You cant help but keep looking at your loose fist knowing theres a tiny man trapped in there.

One by one your friends take turns shrinking some one until theres no one left.

Jason having been shrunk by Sumiko, Tenchi shrunk by Gwen, Michelle shrunk by Nick, and Zoey shrunk by Tony. You all stand there fo a couple minutes admiring your handy work and showing off your new pets to each other. They all seem to have been shrunken down to about 3 inches tall, though their heights are the same as they were before relative to each other.

“Well, i don’t know about the 4 of you, but i’m kind of excited to get this little bitch home.” Tony says motioning to the tiny Zoey in his hand.

You don’t say anything. You been so caught up in finally cutting Randy down to size that you never actually thought much about what you were actually going to do with him once you got home.

You all walk outside and you see your friends putting their tiny captives in their pockets and other different place to keep them safe and secure until they can get them back to their respective homes. You look down at Randy and know you’re going to have to do the same...
1312.title: Your shrink Randy...

choices: you drive back to the hotel.
you decide to have a little fun with randy first.
13122.content:
You turn you back to the group as they all get in their cars and get moving, then bring your fist up to your face and open it up revealing the tiny naked man on your soft flattened palm. he looks up at you trying to hide the fear in his eyes behind rage.

"Just you wait, Zoey will get us out of this, then you'll be sorry." he said shaking his fist.

"For fuck sake Randy." you say fallowed by a sigh. "You really don't get it do you? Zoey is tiny too, all of your teammates are. as of today, the Edge_Runners are over, and all of you are just our pets now."

He crosses his arms and turns away from you. "Why did it have to be you? Why couldn't I have ended up with Gwen or Sumi. Instead I had to get the fake chick."

"FAKE Chick?" you ask knowing full well what he was talking about. "This is how you want to start your first day?... Fine. I have just the place for you then." You say as you unbutton your jean shorts and pull the elastic band from the front of your hips.

Before he has time to realize exactly what's happening you lower him down past your bellybutton and dump him into your panties.

"WAIT! WHAT THE FU...." his sentence is cutoff by the cracking sound of your released waist band slapping back against your ebony skin.

You can feel him on your big black cock crawling around trying to get back up the way he came.
it feels good. REAL good. better than you even expected, but you don't have time to play with him right now. you have a long drive back home ahead of you.
13122.title: Drop Randy down the front of your panties...

14.content:
You are Gwen:
You’re arguably the best player on the team with Sumi at a close second. Sure, you're a 21 year old virgin, have crippling anxiety, and your teammates are literally you're only friends that aren't related to you, BUT you love videogames and get to play them for a living not only as a big league competitive gamer, but also on your streaming channel, so you consider the trade off worth it. Besides, if you really wanted to be in a relationship you could probably just date one of them. Why not? they're all nice enough, and none of them are hideous or anything.

Despite your anxiety, you're actually a pretty happy girl. you like play videogames, workout on your bowflex, and you enjoy Writing stories and/or using programs like DAZ Studios & Source Film Maker to let your creativity flow.


The competition was simple, there's 5 members on each team, so each of you will be pared up against a member of the other team and play a series of 3 matches. the player to win 2 of the 3 will be declared the winner and the whole team will get a point.
The team with 3 out of 5 points will be the winning team and this years champions. With that of course comes cash, fames, and prizes from the competitions sponsors.
But what the media and the rest of the world isn't aware of is the little side bet you all have going.

you're opinion of this bet is actually surprisingly optimistic. this could be fun especially if you win.

Speaking of winning, the competition is currently officially at a draw. These Egde_Runners guys are no joke, and it shows. Tony and Sumi were able to win their matches, but Nick and Sam were outmatched leaving the whole thing on you now.

Your competitor is Randy Shepard, Zoey's baby brother and frankly, kind of a douche.
You try really hard to be nice, but he just wont stop with his blatant sexist remarks and unwanted advances. He's actually a really good looking guy, If he were nice at all you may even be flattered, but he's clearly too in love with himself to ever be anything that more that a trophy boyfriend to someone just as shallow and dead inside as him.


The game is Old-school Pokémon Stadium from the Nintendo 64. You're not a fan of the franchise, but you're familiar with the game. its a solid turn based strategy rpg system, and having played a lot of similar games growing up you're not too shook up.

The first round doesn't go so well. you're not a pokemon fan and it shows as you fumble a round a bit and make some questionable choices as to who you match up against whom, but despite the first round loss you're catching on.

suddenly all that time your brother spent telling you about the game and its characters is finally starting to pay off as you find your legs and just barely manage to win round 2.

The third round starts and you can tell Randy must not be a fan either because a lot of the things he's been doing wouldn't exactly fall under diamond tier in the actual pokemon leagues. this round is going to decide the entire competition and it feels like its literally all just hinging on witch one of you get lucky and fumbles into the win...
14.title: Gwen

You don’t waste anytime throwing in some clothes. You pull on a pair of shorts, a tee-shirt, and flip-flops then head downtown.

You all agreed to meet at Zoeys because its a trailer outside of town. It would be a safe place with no cameras or strangers.

You get to Zoeys and you’re the last one to arrive. Everyone else is already there waiting on you.
Theres of course all your teammates, but also Zoey and her team and they are they are

Zoey Shepard, the 6ft tall green eyed red head ed 23 year old with freckles and a dynamite ass. Shes pretty intense and kind of intimidating. One of those types that know what they want and aren’t afraid to take it.

Her 20 year old baby brother Randy Shepard. He’s just as tall as her and but a lot meaner. Also a ginger and kind of a bully and a douchebag to be completely honest. It will be nice to see him cut down to size.

Tenchi Miyamoto. As the name suggests he’s Japanese. He’s a good looking guy. You can tell he spends a lot of time on his raven colored hair as its always jelled up and spiked. You’re not sure if he doesn’t know english, or is just refusing to speak it because he’s not much of a talker.

Jason Samuel. Another tall guy. African American from Philadelphia. Seems nice, but quiet.

And Michelle Cortinas. A Tall, voluptuous, tan skinned Latino woman from Miami Florida. Famously hot headed and always ready to fight in game and in real life.


Zoey hands you what looks like a small chrome laser pointer and says “You were the big winner, so you get first pick. Witch one if us is going to become your pet?
141.title: YOU WIN! Your team won the bet!!

142.content:
You cant believe it, you lost. You honestly though you could pull it off but now theres balloons, and confetti, and you see some semi famous youtuber congratulating your opponent and asking them questions.

It all just feels so surreal and flying by like a blur. One minute your teammates were all cheering you on and telling you you got this, then you’re suddenly being ushered off the stage to the disappointed faces of your friends and family.

Before you know it you’re waking up to your phone going off with a text message from Zoey that says “You better not be trying to weasel out of this. We’re all meeting up at my place in 20 mins...”


You don’t waste anytime throwing on some clothes. You pull on a pair of shorts, a tee-shirt, and flip-flops then head out.

You all agreed to meet at Zoeys because its a trailer outside of town. It would be a safe place with no cameras or strangers.

Zoey Shepard, the 6ft tall green eyed red headed 23 year old with freckles and a dynamite ass. Shes pretty intense and kind of intimidating. One of those types that know what they want and aren’t afraid to take it.

Her 20 year old baby brother Randy Shepard. He’s just as tall as her but a lot meaner. Also a ginger and kind of a bully and a douchebag to be completely honest. It would have been nice to see him cut down to size.

Tenchi Miyamoto. As the name suggests he’s Japanese. He’s a good looking guy. You can tell he spends a lot of time on his raven colored hair as its always jelled up and spiked. You’re not sure if he doesn’t know english, or is just refusing to speak it because he’s not much of a talker.

Jason Samuel. Another tall guy. African American from Philadelphia. Seems nice, but quiet.

And Michelle Cortinas. A Tall, voluptuous, tan skinned Latino woman from Miami Florida. Famously hot headed and always ready to fight in game and in real life.


Suddenly Zoey zapped you with what looked to be a small chrome laser pointer and you shrunk away to only about 3 inches tall.
You clothes don’t shrink with you trapping you in a pile of cotton that smells like, well... You..

Before you know whats happening a hand reaching in under your shirt as you’re being picked up by....
142.title: YOU LOSE! Your team lost the bet!!

choices: YOU WIN! Your team won the bet!!
YOU LOSE! Your team lost the bet!!
15.content:
You are Sumiko:
You're not a fan of Asian stereotypes, but as far as you're concerned, you are the number 1 player on this team. Sure Gwen and Nick are pretty good and can sometimes get the better of you if you're having an off day or a run of bad luck, but aside from those special circumstances, you're the best.

You do like your teammates fine, even if Nicks "Get Woke, Go Broke" attitude gets on your nerves, but you this isn't a club or family so much as this is all just a job. You're here to play, win, and get paid, and if you had gotten an offer from a better team you would have taken it.


The competition was simple, there's 5 members on each team, so each of you will be pared up against a member of the other team and play a series of 3 matches. the player to win 2 of the 3 will be declared the winner and the whole team will get a point.
The team with 3 out of 5 points will be the winning team and this years champions. With that of course comes cash, fames, and prizes from the competitions sponsors.
But what the media and the rest of the world isn't aware of is the little side bet you all have going.

This whole bet seems like a really stupid distraction, but you're not worried. you're confident in your ability to carry your team to victory if you have to. in fact, that seems to be exactly what's going on.
Nick and Gwen were able to win their matches, but Tony and Sam dropped the ball bad, so now its all down to you. you have to win if you don't want to become someone's pet.


The game is Halo Reach, but you're not at all worried.

Your competitor is Michelle Cortinas, the Latino bombshell from Miami. You admit that she's good, but you're sure you're better.

The first round goes pretty fast, you kicked her ass by the numbers.

the second round however is when things get dicey. you were sloppy and let her get the better of you.

Round three starts up and this is the grand finale, whoever wins this, wins the whole thing...
15.title: Sumi

152.title: YOU LOSE! Your team lost the bet!!

info.brief_description: An off the books bet may change this competitive gamers life forever...
info.description:
Back in 2009 Shrinking technology had finally been ripped from just cheesy science fiction and brought into reality by the brilliant Dr. Katherine M. Anderson, 22 years later and it has become a fully accepted part of the world, though typically reserved for Military use(mostly Espionage) some companies in the private sector have received clearance to use it in their business and research practices.

Today is the big game match up between your team "Neckbeards Incorporated" and the current league champions "The Edge_Runners", and for reasons you may not understand the team captains have placed a friendly little side bet with each other, one that all of you had to agree to if you didn't want kicked off the team.
The losing team is shrunken and kept as pets/property of the winning team.


:THE RULES:

1. SHRINKING ONLY! this is NOT a Giant/Giantess Rampage story..

2. No transformation stuff. If you want to turn people into rats, snakes, and spiders, then you'll have to look elsewhere.
This rule also applies to changing a person's age and/or a person's gender.
Sorry, but this is strictly a Size Story.

3. Please add good/well written chapters. I'm not trying to be a dick or pick on anyone here, but I'm tired of having to sift through shit in my own stories. I will delete garbage one sentence chapters.
I don't mind minor spelling and grammar errors, but If you couldn't be bothered with READING the last couple chapters enough to keep from changing a characters name or screwing up the continuity of the story, then I WILL delete your chapter.
the same goes for broken English. I get that there's a lot of people here that aren't from an English speaking country, and I'm more than happy to have you read and add to my stories, BUT if your chapters are barely readable I will delete them.

4. No child porn. all the characters in this story are young adults. pedophilia will not be tolerated.

5. Anything else really goes though, I'm not picky.
Gay, straight, Sexual content, toilet stuff, vore, feet, crush, and anything else that gets you going is all good.

6. Lastly and Most importantly. HAVE FUN. Don't be at all shy about posting...
